channel.title: salinity on funPlantGenes
channel.description: Recent content in salinity on funPlantGenes

item.title: ORF355
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Gene Symbol: ORF355 Gene Name: ORF355 Genome: Species: Zea mays Functional Descriptions: ORF355 confers enhanced salinity stress adaptability to S-type cytoplasmic male sterility maize by modulating the mitochondrial metabolic homeostasis.

item.title: ZmCBL4;ZmCBL8
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Zm00001eb203330 Gene Symbol: ZmCBL4 ZmCBL8 cbl8 Gene Name: calcineurin B-like8 Genome: Zm-B73-REFERENCE-NAM-5.

item.title: ZmCOI6.1
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Zm00001eb398970 Gene Symbol: ZmCOI6.1 Gene Name: stress inducible protein coi6.

item.title: ZmRAFS;ZmRS
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Zm00001eb122980 Gene Symbol: ZmRAFS ZmRS rafs1 Gene Name: raffinose synthase1 Genome: Zm-B73-REFERENCE-NAM-5.

item.title: ZmVp14;vp14
